segments.text: Welcome back to the channel. Today I am taking you along on a slow coffee day.
I was feeling pretty stressed this week and needed a reset.
We drove out past rolling hills, pine forests, and a wide valley.
At the entrance, a small stall was roasting Ethiopian beans in an old drum.
I grabbed a mug, sat on the wooden deck, and watched the river while the pour-over cooled.
After that we wandered through the old town streets and vintage shops.
This reminded me that the trip was worth it even when plans change.
Thanks for watching, and see you next time.
